issue.title: Add Requests API and reflection fixture

removal_gate: Replace this preserved-package reflection fixture with generated wrapper and host-primitive replacement evidence only after WPHX-323.09 live transport parity, generated overlay manifests, wrapper-shape receipts, and license/provenance review pass.
non_claims: This fixture does not implement Haxe-owned Requests runtime logic.
This fixture does not execute live HTTP, DNS, TLS, proxy, curl, streams/fsockopen, redirect-following, or installed WordPress transport behavior.
This fixture does not generate or validate replacement public PHP wrappers.
The mirrored candidate root is copied upstream Requests evidence only and must not be cited as copied artifact retirement.
